author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

 SOLANA OUTAGE 

Hey everyone,

Unfortunately since 17:00 UTC ( your local time) the Solana chain has halted. The devs over there are working hard to resolve the issue, and we will keep you updated if anything changes.

This means that both the Galactic Marketplace and SCORE are not working at the moment.

You can check the current status here: https://status.solana.com/
